creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

In a word.  No.  I am not just adding a > 800Kb file in the 
patches directory.   This is why we have the PATCHFILES 
and PATCH_SITES directives in ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk 

If you'd like to submit an update that works along these 
lines, I'm sure it would get committed.
